title: Entrepreneurial Operating System (EOS)
excerpt: Looking for help setting up boards for an EOS workflow.  Scorecards, Rocks, Issues, and Meetings would be helpful.  They have a basecamp set up but we shouldn’t need that with the power of Monday.com  Help.

posts.author: colleen928 (Colleen Bonniol)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking for help setting up boards for an EOS workflow. Scorecards, Rocks, Issues, and Meetings would be helpful. They have a basecamp set up but we shouldn’t need that with the power of Monday.com Help.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @colleen928

I do see there is another thread open regarding this, which you can find here: Anyone using Monday.com to track EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System) - #5 by colleen928

With this in mind I’m going to go ahead and close this thread but please do feel free to continue to post in the open thread via the link above!
